case_title: WEN HAO FAN VS. ARLENE TUBIG LACSAMANA

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY FAN, WEN HAO AS TO DEFENDANT LACSAMANA, ARLENE TUBIG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-09-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAN, WEN HAO AS TO DEFENDANT LACSAMANA, ARLENE TUBIG
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-12-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LACSAMANA, ARLENE TUBIG
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LACSAMANA, ARLENE TUBIG AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT FAN, WEN HAO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-09-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT LACSAMANA, ARLENE TUBIG AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT FAN, WEN HAO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AUG-08-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT FAN, WEN HAO
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-09-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-09-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-09-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-09-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CHRISTINA CHANG INTERPRETS ENGLISH/MANDARIN - MANDARIN/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. PLAINTIFF WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE ON CROSS-CLAIM IN OPEN COURT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2011 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FAN, WEN HAO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LACSAMANA, ARLENE TUBIG $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,585.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2011 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LACSAMANA, ARLENE TUBIG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT FAN, WEN HAO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
